title: Suspicious Silence Provision
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Suspicious Silence Provision''' was a section of the [[Galactic Loyalty Act]] that made silence automatic suspicion in criminal investigations and would automatically allow for an interrogation warrant. It was passed by a group of [[Senator/Legends|senators]] at 0320 in the morning, using the eliminated quorum function of the [[Law Enforcement Tools Provision]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
